## Customize Your Own Metal Building

Pro Metal Buildings is your expert in customized prefabricated metal buildings and carports for residential, commercial & agricultural applications spanning up to 100’ wide. Try our 3D rendering tool & price estimator to design your custom metal structure, personalized with your desired color, size and shape. Or, contact our expert design team to bring your vision to life at no cost to you.

### Click On The Building Type For More Details:

[![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)RV Covers](https://prometalbuildings.com/custom-metal-buildings/rv-carports/) [![metal boar cover](<Base64-Image-Removed>)Boat Covers](https://prometalbuildings.com/custom-metal-buildings/boat-covers/) [![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)Carports](https://prometalbuildings.com/custom-metal-buildings/standard-carport/) [![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)Garages](https://prometalbuildings.com/custom-metal-buildings/garages/) [![Custom Metal Barn](<Base64-Image-Removed>)Barns](https://prometalbuildings.com/custom-metal-buildings/barns/) [![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)Loafing Sheds & Lean-Tos](https://prometalbuildings.com/custom-metal-buildings/loafing-sheds-lean-tos/) [![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)Utility Buildings](https://prometalbuildings.com/custom-metal-buildings/utility-buildings/) [![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)Warehouses](https://prometalbuildings.com/custom-metal-buildings/warehouses/) [![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)Airplane Hangars](https://prometalbuildings.com/custom-metal-buildings/airplane-hangers/)

## About Us

Welcome to Pro Metal Buildings, a family and women-owned distributor of custom metal buildings. We work hard to offer exceptional customer service. You, as our customer, are our top priority. With over 50 years of experience, we believe we can help you create the building that is just right for you and your needs. Our buildings come with Free Delivery and Installation on your level land (with a few exceptions). So sit back, relax, and let us do the work for you.

![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

November 12, 2024







I contacted Kathryn with Pro Metal Buildings to get prices for a 10' X 20' building. She was very helpful and knowledgeable about options to consider for our building. This... read more included color choices as well as additional truss strength for snow. She was also able to create a visual of the building as designed and with the colors chosen. The price was competitive, and I was sent the contract. I was contacted within a couple days to schedule the install crew. The crew was very efficient and completed the install within 2.5 hours. We are very satisfied with the building and the quality of the install!



Cindy

November 11, 2024
